hub.title: myDevDock

projects.title: Active Projects
projects.emptyHint: No projects have been registered on this machine yet.
projects.promptScanPath: Enter the parent folder path to scan:
projects.scanNoProjects: No projects were found in that folder. Check the path and that projects are within 5 levels deep.
projects.confirmClear: This will remove ALL projects and groups from the dashboard. Continue?
projects.clearDone: All projects and groups were removed.

groups.hint: Group projects and open them together

groupSpace.emptyHint: No projects in this group. Click the hand icon to drag projects here.

footer.dropHint: Drag a project into a group

settingsModal.editorNotInstalled: The current default editor ({{editor}}) is not installed.

openProject.title: Open project
openProject.subtitle: Choose an editor to open this project.

sort.sectionHint: How projects are listed on the dashboard (after search filter).

theme.appearanceHint: Global visual theme (Tailwind + CSS variables in styles.css).

neon.title: Neon glass
neon.hint: Neon green/blue, glass — current product identity.

aurora.title: Night aurora
aurora.hint: Violet/cyan mesh, Aurora UI style (creative premium).

oled.title: Minimal OLED
oled.hint: True black, restrained accents — OLED / low brightness.

obsidian.title: Obsidian desk
obsidian.hint: Cool zinc/violet slate — dark SaaS like Linear.

day.title: Day (slate)
day.hint: Cool light, high contrast — daytime / office.

dawn.title: Dawn (paper)
dawn.hint: Warm light, sand tones — less eye strain.

settings.title: Raycast Script Commands
settings.hint: Set the folder Raycast already uses for scripts. myDevDock will create launchers there.
settings.notDetected: Raycast not detected (you can still export if your scripts folder is configured).
settings.pickTitle: Select your Raycast Script Commands folder
settings.promptPath: Enter the Raycast scripts folder path:

form.title: Create Raycast launcher
form.pathMissing: You need to configure the Raycast scripts folder in Settings first.
form.launcherNameHelp: This is the text shown in Raycast search results.
form.fileNameHelp: Used to create the .sh file. Letters, numbers, and dashes only.
form.iconHelp: Pick a visual icon for this launcher.
form.editorHelp: Editor this launcher will use when executed.
form.keywordsHelp: Helps users find the command faster in Raycast.
form.required: Please fill launcher name and file name.
